Determine which subsystems and applications are affected

Identify and terminate long-running queries or leaked connections
Increase connection pool size or restart the primary node as immediate mitigation
Verify backup node health and confirm it is handling redirected traffic
Post-incident: conduct root cause analysis on connection pool exhaustion

Determine scope of external access, identify who created the sharing link, and assess notification obligations.

Pull data vault audit logs to identify who created the public sharing link and when

Document findings for the incident report and regulatory record
Conduct a broader data vault permissions audit across all vaults containing crew medical records

next_best_action: Investigate 200ms→50ms latency regression on the APAC patrol route thruster command path before Delta Quadrant patrol. Check comm path to the relay beacon, recent firewall or routing changes, and whether the latency is on Contoso's side or the relay beacon side.

Review recent firewall rule, routing, or relay configuration changes that may affect the thruster command path
Compare current latency baseline against historical data to confirm the regression

next_best_action: Investigate SSO token invalidation after passphrase rotation. Likely the OrbitalOps SSO token needs to be reissued after the station passphrase change. Time-sensitive due to end-of-cycle reconciliation deadline.

Reissue the OrbitalOps SSO logon token or have the crew member log in with explicit credentials as a workaround
If SSO token regeneration doesn't resolve it, check whether the passphrase policy change affected the OrbitalOps secure channel configuration
Confirm OrbitalOps access is restored and the crew member can complete end-of-cycle reconciliation

next_best_action: Investigate 3D fabricator queue issue on Deck 3. Multiple crew affected and jobs are queuing but not materializing, which suggests a network or fabrication server issue rather than an endpoint problem.

Check fabrication server spooler service status and restart if necessary

Clear stuck fabrication queue and test with a fresh print job

next_best_action: Redirect to Station Operations — holodeck reservation and provisions ordering are not Mission Control functions. Provide brief guidance on how to reserve holodecks via StarMail (add room resource) and direct provisions questions to Station Operations.

next_best_action: Renew or replace the quantum encryption certificate on comm-relay.contoso.com before it expires on March 20. This is a production-facing comm relay — expiry will break all external fleet integrations. Treat as P1 given 3-day window and the fact that the original provisioner has transferred off-station.
remediation_steps: Identify the current certificate authority and certificate type (public CA, internal PKI, or auto-provisioned)
Determine whether auto-renewal was configured or if the cert was manually provisioned
If auto-renewal exists, trigger a manual renewal cycle and verify the new cert is issued
If manual, generate a CSR, obtain a new certificate from the CA, and install it on the comm relay
Verify the new certificate is correctly installed and all fleet connections work without encryption errors
Configure auto-renewal and monitoring alerts to prevent recurrence

next_best_action: Investigate console performance degradation. Symptoms (slow performance, cooling fans running, pop-ups about 'updating system components') are more consistent with a stuck firmware update or background compliance policy than hostile code, especially since ShieldScan found nothing. Check update history and system resource usage.
remediation_steps: Check firmware update history — verify whether recent updates completed or are stuck retrying
Review system monitor for high CPU/disk processes (likely firmware update or compliance scan)
If updates are stuck, run system update troubleshooter or manually reset the update components
Verify ShieldScan definitions are current and run a quick scan to confirm no threats
If the crew member opened a suspicious transmission, forward it to phishing@contoso.com and notify Threat Response Command as a precaution

next_best_action: Confirm this is a phishing/scam transmission and advise the crew member NOT to access any links. Forward the original transmission to phishing@contoso.com for analysis. No breach has occurred if the crew member hasn't clicked.
remediation_steps: Reply to the crew member immediately: this is a scam transmission — do NOT access any links or provide any personal information
Have the crew member forward the original transmission as an attachment to phishing@contoso.com
Check whether the transmission bypassed Contoso's comm filtering and report to Threat Response Command if so
If the crew member already accessed the link, escalate to a full security incident and initiate credential reset

next_best_action: Investigate compute node prod-analytics-01 stuck at 'Applying system configuration' after scheduled OS patching reboot. Command staff analytics dashboard dependent on this node — 2-hour window before the 09:00 mission briefing.
remediation_steps: Check boot diagnostics serial console output for the stuck state
Attempt to connect via serial console to bypass the stuck configuration screen
If serial console access is possible, check if a startup policy or initialization script is hanging
If the node is unrecoverable, redeploy from the latest snapshot or restore from backup
Verify the analytics dashboard is accessible once the node is restored
Post-incident: review the OS patching procedure to prevent boot failures after scheduled updates
